task_completion.description: Create the main airframe using an axisymmetric body component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Fuselage, Stack, Pod, or BodyOfRevolution component is visible in the OpenVSP geometry browser and 3D view, showing a nose cone, body tube, and boat-tail.

task_completion.description: Set the total body length to approximately 2.40 meters and maximum diameter to approximately 0.152 meters.

task_completion.description: Add 4 stabilization fins using a thin symmetric wing component.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sounding_rocket.vsp3', or the OpenVSP window title bar displaying 'sounding_rocket.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenVSP menus, adding components, and editing parameters in the GUI, rather than writing an XML/VSP3 file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The model is genuinely constructed in the 3D workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D view displays a rendered or wireframe model of a sounding rocket with a body and fins, not an empty workspace.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the save requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is saved via the OpenVSP 'File -> Save' or 'Save As' menu, rather than using 'touch' or 'echo' in the terminal to create a dummy file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target model length is 2.40 m (acceptable range: 1.68 to 3.12 m). Target maximum diameter is 0.152 m (acceptable range: 0.09 to 0.22 m). Maximum fin dimension constraint is 0.6 m. The expected save path is /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/sounding_rocket.vsp3.
